title: Rekoto ea mesebetsi ea ts'ebetso (Art. 30 GDPR)
Record of processing activities (Art. 30 GDPR)
2c0ebdaae5e241fe4f4a7730879c5e0c
tea_BantuA_en2nystsnswxhzu_2021q3.md
updated: E ntlafalitsoe: Phupu 2026. Rekoto ena e fana ka litokomane tsa mesebetsi ea motho ka mong ho sebetsa Wedingo.
Updated: July 2026. This record documents personal data processing activities in Wedingo.
row1Data: Mabitso a banyalani, letsatsi, sebaka, sehlooho, linepe, 'mino, menu, likarolo
Couple names, date, venue, theme, photos, music, menu, sections
row1Purpose: Theha le ho iketsetsa memo ea lenyalo
row1Retention: Ha ak'haonte e ntse e sebetsa
row2Data: Lebitso la moeti, ba teng (ee/che), khetho ea menyetla, lintho tse hananang le tsona, lintlha tsa bophelo bo botle
Guest name, attendance (yes/no), menu selection, allergies, health data
row2Purpose: Laola lenane la baeti le menu
row3Recipients: Google Cloud (Pokello e nyenyane ea lebenkele la mollo)
row4Data: Letšoao la kopano, lebitso la mosebelisi
row4Purpose: Laola phihlello ho phanele ea admin
Control access to the admin panel
row5Data: Liketso tsa Superadmin, li-tokens tse sebelisitsoeng, limemo tse hlakotsoeng
Superadmin actions, used tokens, deleted invitations
internationalText: Lintlha li bolokiloe ho li-server tsa Google Cloud sebakeng sa eur3 (Frankfurt, Germany).
Data is stored on Google Cloud servers in the eur3 region (Frankfurt, Germany).
scc: Melao e Tloaelehileng ea Konteraka (SCC) - Ho phethahatsa Qeto ea 2021/914
dpf: Moralo oa Lekunutu la Boitsebiso (DPF) EU-US, UK-US le Switzerland-US
Data Privacy Framework (DPF) EU-US, UK-US and Switzerland-US
measuresTitle: Mehato ea tekheniki le ea mokhatlo
measureEncryption: AES-256-GCM encryption ea litšoantšo le data ea bohlokoa (PBKDF2)
AES-256-GCM encryption of images and sensitive data (PBKDF2)
measureTls: Khokahano ea HTTPS (TLS 1.3) ho pholletsa le sethala kaofela
HTTPS connection (TLS 1.3) across the entire platform
measureFirestore: Melao ea ts'ireletso ea Firestore (taolo ea phihlello e thehiloeng ho nako)
measureStorage: Sebaka se fokolang sa polokelo ea lehae ka tumello feela
Minimal local storage with consent only
measureRetention: Leano la ho boloka: Likhoeli tse 12 kamora ketsahalo bakeng sa lintlha tsa baeti
Retention policy: 12 months post-event for guest data
measureSuperadmin: Superadmin e sirelelitsoe ke netefatso ea Firebase + tsela e patiloeng
Superadmin protected by Firebase Authentication + hidden route

superadminNoPermissions: Ak'haonte ena ha e na litumello tsa tsamaiso.
This account does not have administration permissions.
superadminInvalidEmail: Sebopeho sa lengolo-tsoibila ha se sebetse.
The email format is not valid.
superadminLoginError: Phoso ea ho kena. Sheba khokahano ea hau.
Error logging in. Check your connection.

invitationText: Re labalabela ho keteka nako ena e khethehileng le uena.
We look forward to celebrating this special moment with you.

golden: E khabane ebile e khanyang, e nang le li-accents tsa khauta.
Elegant and bright, with golden accents.
forest: Ea tlhaho ebile e hlaphohetsoe ka meroho e bonolo.
Natural and sober with soft greens.
rose: E futhumetse ebile e boreleli, e nang le mebala e pinki.
Warm and delicate, with pink hues.
linen-soft: Leseli le ho se nke lehlakore, ka boteng bo khutsitseng le bo sa feleng.
Light and neutral, with a serene and timeless presence.
blush-pearl: E bonolo ebile e ratana, e nang le melumo e pinki ea perela.
Soft and romantic, with pearly pink tones.
lavender-mist: E ncha ebile e khutsitse, e na le mebala ea lavender le e boreleli.
Fresh and serene, with lavender and mauve hues.
champagne-bubble: E khanyang le ea mokete, e nang le mahlaseli a khauta a futhumetseng.
Bright and festive, with warm golden sparkles.
amber-night: E lefifi ebile e boreleli, e nang le lintlha tsa amber le khauta.
Dark and elegant, with amber and gold highlights.
onyx-gold: E tebile ebile e rarahane, e na le khauta e tebileng sebakeng se lefifi.
Deep and sophisticated, with intense gold on dark background.
midnight-royal: Boputsoa bo lefifi haholo bo nang le khauta e ngata le boteng bo hlakileng.
Very dark blue with intense gold and solemn presence.
burgundy-velvet: E futhumetse ebile e koahela, e nang le veine e khubelu le litlolo tsa khauta.
Warm and enveloping, with red wine and golden sparkles.
sapphire-night: Boputsoa bo tebileng bo nang le mantsoe a silevera le boteng bo khutsitseng.
Deep blue with silver accents and serene presence.
emerald-grove: Botala bo tebileng ba tlhaho bo nang le mebala ea khauta le e ntle.
Deep natural green with golden and elegant hues.
plum-twilight: Bopherese bo tebileng bo pinki le bo phatsimang ba lerato.
Intense purple with pink and romantic sparkles.
rainbow: Keteko ea lerato le fapaneng le mebala ea mookoli.
Celebration of diverse love with rainbow colors.
trans: Boputsoa, ​​bopinki le bosweu e le tlotla ho folaga ya trans.
Blue, pink and white in tribute to the trans flag.
nonbinary: Bosehla, bosweu, bopherese le botsho bakeng sa folaga eo e seng ya binary.
Yellow, white, purple and black for the non-binary flag.
lesbian: E mmala wa namune, o mosweu le o pinki wa folaga ya dilesbiene.
Orange, white and pink of the lesbian flag.
bi: Bopinki, bopherese le boputsoa ba folakha ea bi.
Pink, purple and blue of the bi flag.
pan: E pinki, e mosehla le e putsoa ea folakha ea pan.
Pink, yellow and blue of the pan flag.
ace: Botšo, bohlooho, bosoeu le bopherese ba folakha ea bosodoma.
Black, gray, white and purple of the asexual flag.

playArea: Rea u amohela ka sebaka sa ho bapala
